name: braid
description: Continuous architecture evolution for growing codebases.

scripts.analyze:example: pnpm build && node apps/cli/dist/index.js analyze examples/bloated-saas --no-save
scripts.propose:example: pnpm build && node apps/cli/dist/index.js propose examples/bloated-saas --no-save
scripts.benchmark:smoke: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js run --suite phase-2-core --smoke
scripts.benchmark:run: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js run --suite phase-2-core
scripts.benchmark:compare: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js compare --suite static-comparison
scripts.benchmark:real:list: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js repositories list
scripts.benchmark:real:qualify: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js repositories qualify
scripts.benchmark:real:run: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js run --suite real-world-phase-2
scripts.benchmark:real:regression: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js regression --suite real-world-phase-2 --baseline real-world-phase-2-precision-v1 --policy real-world
scripts.benchmark:migration:smoke: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js migration --mode smoke
scripts.benchmark:migration:run: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js migration --mode run
scripts.benchmark:migration:regression: pnpm build && node packages/benchmark/dist/cli/index.js migration --mode regression
